replies.msg:
美國人其實係知有咩分別
雖然係點都有班ON9拉埋黎講
尋日就有條左癌比josh hawley開佢波
就算有班人成日講嘅咩"唔好重注侵侵 人地唔鍾意"
其實美國人都唔覺有咩問題 至少我見到嘅係咁啦


https://twitter.com/godsicakth/status/1267148882628263936
for everyone coming under this tweet, rememberer DO. NOT. SUPPORT. HK!
they are not on our side, their protests are from far right wing

I believe you have some misunderstanding abt the Autonomy Action being right wing. HK autonomy & liberty are guaranteed under Sino-British Joint Declaration, while the US-HK Policy Act recognizes HK being different from China & therefore grants preferential treatment.

if you do not know much then dont share propagando/statements like these. Do your research and become informed before saying stuff you are not prepared to share on or defend on

HK is asking trump to liberate them because nobody else has the power to do it. They aren't sympathizing with him or his administration. You're spreading misinformation about a country's autonomy being stolen from them. If you don't know don't speak. Google more before you type.

Stop sharing shit u don’t know anything about. If Obama was president now his name would be on that banner. They are just tryna raise awareness for whoever the president of the USA is. Which happens to be Trump at the time.

The only reason why they said "Donald Trump, please Liberate Hong Kong" is because he's the US president. If Obama was still the president, it'd read "Barack Obama, please Liberate Hong Kong."
